description: Anchor phrases for zero-shot embedding classification. Each event_type maps to several concrete example utterances. Client embeds the incoming message and compares against these anchors via cosine similarity. Written deliberately concrete (not abstract category labels) since embedding models match against realistic phrasing far better than against definitions.
